data.title: A Phase 2 Study of the Pharmacodynamics, Safety and Tolerability, and Pharmacokinetics of Multiple Doses of TD-4208 for 7 Days in Subjects Diagnosed With Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
data.brief_summary: This study will characterize the dose response of TD-4208 after 7 days of dosing in subjects with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD).
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

1. Subject is a male or female between the ages of 40 and 75 years (inclusive, at randomization).
2. Subject:

   * Has an FEV1/FVC (forced expiratory volume in 1 second/forced vital capacity) \<0.7 at screening; and
   * Has a post-bronchodilator FEV1 at screening of between 30
endpoints: Change From Baseline to Day 7 in Trough FEV1 (Forced Expiratory Volume in 1 Second)
